post.description: Exchanges Auth0 authorization code for tokens and returns user profile in FEN format. This is the BFF endpoint that handles the secure token exchange with Auth0.

requestBody.description: Authorization code, redirect URI, and PKCE code_verifier from Auth0 Universal Login

200.description: Authentication successful - Returns FEN formatted response with user profile and tokens

401.description: Authentication failed - Invalid code, unauthorized domain, or Auth0 error

example.message: Dominio de correo no permitido. Solo se permiten correos @ucaldas.edu.co

post.description: Exchanges Auth0 refresh token for new tokens and generates updated local JWT. Maintains user session without re-authentication.

requestBody.description: Refresh token and user ID for token renewal

200.description: Token refresh successful - Returns FEN formatted response with new tokens

401.description: Token refresh failed - Invalid refresh token or user not found

500.description: Internal server error - Auth0 service unavailable

example.message: No se pudo refrescar la sesión

post.description: Invalidates the current JWT token by adding it to a blacklist. The token will no longer be valid for authentication.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid token or token does not belong to user

info.title: Uniconnect API
info.description:
Documentación oficial de la API REST de Uniconnect — red social universitaria.

Todos los endpoints protegidos requieren un JWT Bearer token obtenido en `POST /api/auth/callback`.

**OpenAPI JSON**: `GET /docs-json`  |  **OpenAPI YAML**: `GET /docs-yaml`

code.description: Authorization code received from Auth0 Universal Login

redirect_uri.description: Redirect URI used in the Auth0 authorization request

code_verifier.description: PKCE code_verifier used to generate the code_challenge

id_program.description: ID del programa al que pertenece

id_group.description: ID del grupo al que se invita

inviter_id.description: ID del usuario que envía la invitación (debe ser admin)

invitee_id.description: ID del usuario que recibe la invitación

status.description: Respuesta a la invitación: accepted o rejected

description.example: Charla sobre avances en IA aplicada a la educación.

body.example: Estoy tratando de entender la recursión...
La recursión es cuando una función se llama a sí misma...

contenido.example: Excelente recurso, muy útil para el parcial.
